head: head_a
note: Train-pool datasets (WESAD, Stress-Predict) are scored by grouped leave-one-subject-out, not by predicting their own training rows. Nurse Stress is genuinely held out. Naturalistic Nurse numbers are expected to be lower than lab-protocol datasets: labels are sparse self-report and the setting is uncontrolled real hospital work.
STALE: Generated by the old pooled m2 model, which no longer exists. Predates features-v2, per-subject personalization, and WESAD-only training. Regenerate with scripts/build_scoreboard.py before citing.
